statement.en: Iron-Controlled Surface Complexation and Fluoride Desorption in Natural Soils: Experimental and Modeling Insights

proposer: Bhawna Thakur, Ms. Raheena K. M., Hafsa Nazir et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The paper presents experimental and modeling work on fluoride desorption in iron-complexed soils. This is recent (2026), appears to be preprint or early-stage publication (dated future relative to current knowledge cutoff), and combines empirical soil chemistry with computational modeling. The findings are provisionally valid pending peer review validation and independent replication of experimental results.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 鉄が蛍石を引き寄せ、土の酸性度と電荷が織りなす踊りの中で、離別が決まる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 鉄核は土壌表面の領地を支配し、蛍光物質を上下に揺さぶりながら、絶えず放出と吸着のバレエを踊る。
